tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Well, it's my first tab, so be good with me :)  This is a dance song from 90's,
which has a pop cover made by the Italian group, Ex-Otago. This is the tab.

Capo 3
Without capo the chords are: Abmaj7 - Cm - Bb - Fsus2, but it's simpler with the capo.

[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     033210
[ch]Am[/ch]        002210
[ch]G[/ch]         320033
[ch]Dsus2[/ch]     000320


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
You could put some joy upon my face[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
oh sunshine in an empty place[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
take me to turn to and babe I'll make you stay[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Oh I can ease you of your pain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
feel you give me love again[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
round and round we go, each time I hear you say[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
This is the rhythm of the night[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
the night[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
oh yeah[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
the rhythm of the night[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
This is the rhythm of my life[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
my life[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
oh yeah[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
the rhythm of my life[/tab]

and so on!! Hugs :)
